priority_basis: No active Frontier-owned item remained in ACTIVE_QUEUE.json; selected the highest unresolved handoff from R-019: bind coverage evidence to replay navigation identity.
finding: Coverage and replay evidence must match one opaque navigation identity before interpretation is allowed.
